title: [v5.2] CI: podman-machine: do not use cache registry
body:
It's too difficult to keep the podman-machine image up-to-date. And, we can't use the cache on Mac/Windows, so if quay is down we're hosed no matter what.

Add a "nocache" mechanism to install_test_configs() and use that in machine test setup.

Manual cherrypick of #23461 from main, one trivial conflict.

```release-note
None
```
